message:
🐛 Fix crash when stats.types is undefined in GPUStatus card (#1162)

Defensive guard on stats.types.join() which could be undefined when
useCardData transforms items during search/pagination.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -247,7 +247,7 @@ export function GPUStatus({ config }: GPUStatusProps) {
- {stats.types.join(', ')} + {(stats.types || []).join(', ')} {stats.used}/{stats.total} {t('gpuStatus.gpus')}
